description.ko: 미래 도시 중심부의 활기찬 빛의 궤적과 데이터 스트림을 보여주는, 비 내리는 사이버펑크 대도시의 고고도 전경입니다.
description.en: A high-altitude view of a rainy cyberpunk metropolis, showcasing the vibrant light trails and data streams of a futuristic urban core.

prompt: A cinematic wide shot of NEON-V, titled 'The Holographic Zenith.' A sprawling cyberpunk megacity where #1A0033 indigo skyscrapers are linked by sky-bridges pulsing with #FF00FF magenta and #00FFFF cyan holographic data streams. A torrential downpour creates ray-traced puddle reflections on wet metallic asphalt, while maglev vehicles leave long #FF6B35 orange light trails cutting through dense, smoky volumetric fog. Giant advertising screens cast flickering lens flares across the urban landscape. Hyper-detailed tech-noir textures, 8k resolution, capturing the melancholic soul of a future city.
